headline: Strategic angle — Accelerate climate disclosure and set science-based targets to regain ESG fund interest (potential cost of capital reduction up to 40 bps)
what_matters: Adani Power's high carbon ranking widens its ESG score gap versus peers like JSW Energy, increasing risk of index exclusion and negative ratings momentum.
No direct talent or consumer impact; reputational risk may affect community trust but not immediate workforce or customer demand.
Triggers BRSR (SEBI), CDP, GRI 305, and TCFD frameworks; non-disclosure or weak disclosure could prompt SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
action: Strategic opportunity: Accelerate climate disclosure and set science-based targets to regain ESG fund interest (potential cost of capital reduction up to 40 bps)
Competitive position: Adani Power at disadvantage vs JSW Energy, which has lower carbon intensity and better ESG disclosure
